{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = nine virtues
| introduced = The Crimson Vault
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|The nine virtues are the core components of [[Elysia]], a tenth territory representing human enlightenment that was granted access to the world over a millennium ago. These virtues serve as essential qualities required for individuals to safely wield specific powers and access different districts within [[Elysia]]. Each virtue is designed to complement the nature of one of the nine original territories, providing a moral balance to their elemental powers. For example, mercy acts as a necessary counterbalance to the judgmental nature of [[Naraka]], while selflessness serves as a foundational keystone for all virtues. Specific virtues are tied to particular abilities and locations: bravery is required for combat powers in the [[Gold District]], patience is linked to defensive capabilities in the [[Green District]], loyalty grants access to flight and levitation in the [[Orange District]], wisdom is central to the [[Silver District]], and mercy is exemplified in the [[Blue District]]. Additionally, a white virtue related to self-[[sacrifice]] is required to use the weaponry found in [[Ragnarus the Crimson Vault{{!}}Ragnarus]] with proper discipline.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Elysia]] is organized around [[nine virtues]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c13">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate concepts]]
